use_cases: Site-wide search functionality with premium animated visual effects for SaaS applications
E-commerce product search with eye-catching glow animations to increase engagement
Developer tool search bar with modern gradient aesthetics matching dark UIs
Navigation bar search input with animated gradient rotation on focus states
ai_summary: An animated glowing search bar featuring rotating conic gradient backgrounds that respond to hover and focus states. The component uses layered blur effects and smooth 2000ms-4000ms transitions to create a premium, modern aesthetic with purple, pink, and dark color tones. Designed as a visually striking search input for desktop and mobile platforms.
